title: stenocephalum niveum
intro: Stenocephalum niveum, also known as White Head, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Stenocephalum niveum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be effectively harnessed for therapeutic purposes.
